ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Match keywords regardless of upper/lower case (e.g. typing “dortmund” matches keyword “Dortmund”).
ast.target: 匹配关键词时忽略大小写（例如，输入“dortmund”可匹配关键词“Dortmund”）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Delimiter between display text and keyword for single-word aliases. Example: York//Urlaub → [[Urlaub|York]]
ast.target: 用于分隔单字别名中显示文本和关键词的分隔符。示例：York//Urlaub → [[Urlaub|York]]

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Delimiter that wraps display text for multi-word aliases. Example: ///New York///Urlaub → [[Urlaub|New York]]
ast.target: 用于包裹多字别名中显示文本的分隔符。示例：///New York///Urlaub → [[Urlaub|New York]]

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically use all note names and existing wikilinks from the vault as keywords.
ast.target: 自动使用库中所有笔记名称和现有维基链接作为关键词。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use aliases defined in note frontmatter (aliases/alias field) as additional keywords.
ast.target: 使用笔记前置数据中定义的别名（aliases/alias 字段）作为附加关键词。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Ignore auto-detected keywords shorter than this (0 = no limit). Does not affect manual keywords.
ast.target: 忽略短于此长度的自动检测关键词（0 = 无限制）。不影响手动关键词。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Keywords to exclude from auto-linking (one per line). Does not affect manual keywords.
ast.target: 从自动链接中排除的关键词（每行一个）。不影响手动关键词。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose whether the listed folders are excluded or are the only ones included.
ast.target: 选择列出的文件夹是被排除还是作为唯一包含的文件夹。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Folders to include or exclude from vault scanning (one per line).
ast.target: 要包含或排除在库扫描之外的文件夹（每行一个）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Periodically scan all notes and retroactively convert plain-text keywords to wikilinks. Notes currently open in the editor are skipped to avoid cursor jumps.
ast.target: 定期扫描所有笔记，并追溯性地将纯文本关键词转换为维基链接。为避免光标跳动，当前在编辑器中打开的笔记会被跳过。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How often to scan the vault for unlinkable keywords (1–60 minutes).
ast.target: 扫描库中可链接关键词的频率（1-60 分钟）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Convert URLs to Markdown links while typing or pasting. Detects http(s)://... and bare domains (e.g. youtube.de).
ast.target: 在输入或粘贴时将 URL 转换为 Markdown 链接。可检测 http(s)://... 和裸域名（例如 youtube.de）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: TLDs to detect for bare domains (one per line, without leading dot). Only affects bare domains — http(s):// URLs always link.
ast.target: 用于检测裸域名的顶级域名（每行一个，不带前导点）。仅影响裸域名——http(s):// URL 总是会被链接。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 启用定期自动重新链接

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Note too large for auto-linking (max 100k characters).
ast.target: 笔记过大，无法进行自动链接（最大 10 万字符）。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 未找到可链接的关键词。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Single-word and multi-word delimiters must be different.
ast.target: 单字和多字分隔符必须不同。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Warning: one delimiter is a substring of the other. This may cause parsing conflicts.
ast.target: 警告：一个分隔符是另一个的子字符串。这可能会导致解析冲突。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Link selection and add to keyword list
ast.target: 链接选区并添加到关键词列表

ast.name: name
ast.target: 自动链接当前笔记中的关键词

ast.name: name
ast.target: 自动链接所有笔记中的关键词
